perturbation.original_text: LIMITATION ON USE. Investor’s use of the Confidential Information shall solely be for the purpose of evaluating the Prop erty and the Development.
perturbation.changed_text: LIMITATION ON USE. Investor’s use of the Confidential Information shall solely be for the purpose of evaluating the Prop erty and the Development. However, the Investor may use the Confidential Information for other purposes, provided they obtain written consent from the Owner.
perturbation.explanation: By adding 'However, the Investor may use the Confidential Information for other purposes, provided they obtain written consent from the Owner.' we are contradicting the original statement where the Investor’s use of the Confidential Information should solely be for the purpose of evaluating the Property and the Development. Now the Investor has an option for use in other purposes with written consent. This creates uncertainty on whether the use is limited.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 2. LIMITATION ON USE. Investor’s use of the Confidential Information shall solely be for the purpose of evaluating the Prop erty and the Development. If the Investor elects not to proceed with the Development, or if the undersi gned is informed that the Property is no longe r available for purchase or if the Investor is otherwise requested by the Owne r to return the Confidential Information, the Investor will promptly return all Confi dential Information (and all reproduc tions or destroy electronic copies thereof if any);
perturbation.justification: The original text and the contradicted text both state that the Investor's use of Confidential Information 'shall solely be for the purpose of evaluating the Property and the Development.' The changed text adds a clause allowing the Investor to use the Confidential Information for other purposes with written consent, directly contradicting the 'solely' limitation in both the original text and the contradicted text. This creates an in-text contradiction because the changed text introduces an exception to a previously absolute restriction, making the scope of permissible use uncertain.

perturbation.original_text: All unwritten Confidential Information shall be held by the Investor and kept strictly confidential by the Investor and its employees, representatives, and agents pursuant to the terms of this Agreement in perpetuity.
perturbation.changed_text: All unwritten Confidential Information shall be held by the Investor and kept strictly confidential by the Investor and its employees, representatives, and agents pursuant to the terms of this Agreement for a period of 5 years, after which the obligation of confidentiality shall cease.
perturbation.explanation: By changing 'in perpetuity' to 'for a period of 5 years, after which the obligation of confidentiality shall cease' we are creating a contradiction. The text initially states that the information will be kept strictly confidential in perpetuity, meaning forever; however, by introducing a timeline of 5 years, it limits the confidentiality agreement to only that time.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 5. All written Confidential Information and any copies thereof in the Investor's possession or the possession of the Investor's employees or agents, including, without limitation, that portion of the Confidential Information that may be found in analyses, compilations, studies or other documents prepared by or for the Investor , shall be returned to Owne r promptly upon its request. All unwritten Confidential Information shall be held by the Investor and kept strictly confidential by the Investor and its employees, representatives, and agents pursuant to the terms of this Agreement in perpetuity.
perturbation.justification: The original text states the unwritten Confidential Information will be kept strictly confidential in perpetuity. The changed text limits this confidentiality to 5 years, after which the obligation ceases. The contradicted text contains the original clause, which states 'All unwritten Confidential Information shall be held by the Investor and kept strictly confidential... in perpetuity.' This creates a direct conflict, because the changed text creates a time limit for confidentiality that did not exist originally, and directly violates the perpetuity aspect of the confidentiality clause in the contradicted text.

perturbation.original_text: Notwithstanding the foregoing , the following will not constitute Confidential Information for purposes of this Agreement: (i) informa tion that has become generally available to the public other than as a result of a disclosure by or through the Investor or its employees, representatives, and agents; (ii) information that was available to the Investor on a non-confidential basis prior to its disclosure to the undersigned by the Owner; and (iii) information that becomes available to the Investor from a source not subject, to the best knowl edge of the Investor after due inquiry, to any prohibition against disclosing the information to the unde rsigned.
perturbation.changed_text: Notwithstanding the foregoing , the following will not constitute Confidential Information for purposes of this Agreement: (i) informa tion that has become generally available to the public other than as a result of a disclosure by or through the Investor or its employees, representatives, and agents; (ii) information that was available to the Investor on a non-confidential basis prior to its disclosure to the undersigned by the Owner; and (iii) information that becomes available to the Investor from a source not subject, to the best knowl edge of the Investor after due inquiry, to any prohibition against disclosing the information to the unde rsigned. (iv) Information that Owner provides written consent is not considered Confidential Information.
perturbation.explanation: By adding '(iv) Information that Owner provides written consent is not considered Confidential Information.' we are stating that even information that the Owner writes will not be considered confidential. This creates confusion because there is a clause in place to keep information strictly confidential.
perturbation.contradicted_text: NON-DISCLOSURE. Investor shall keep the Confidential Information permanently and strictly confidential, and not to discl ose or divulge any Confidential Information to, or reproduc e any Confidential Information for the benefit of any person or entity other than the Investor’s employees, representatives, consultants, and agents who are actively and directly participating in the analysis of the Development, and in such cases only to the extent reasonably required for such analysis. The Investor also agrees to inform all such employees, representatives, consultants, and agents of the confidential nature of the Confidential Information, to provide them with a copy of this Agreement, to obtain their agreement to act in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement, and to take such other action as may be reasonably necessary to cause such employees to comply with these confidentiality provisions. Investor is strictl y prohibited from publishing any news release, public announc ement, denial or confirmation with respect to the Development, this Agreement or any information about the Property. The Investor agrees to be fully respons ible for any breach of this Agreement caused by such employees, representatives, co nsultants, and agents.
perturbation.justification: The changed text adds a clause that information is not considered confidential if the Owner provides written consent. The contradicted text states that the Investor shall keep the Confidential Information permanently and strictly confidential, and not disclose or divulge any Confidential Information. The added clause directly contradicts the non-disclosure agreement as it allows the owner to waive confidentiality, while the original agreement intends to keep it permanently confidential. This constitutes a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: The extent and irrepa rable nature of the damages that may result from a breach of this Agreement may make Owner’s legal remedies for such a breach inadequate. Therefore, in the event of such breach or threatened breach of this Agreement, Owne r shall be entitled to appropriate injunctive relief without proof of actual damages, in addition, and not in substitution for, any other remedy Owner may have.
perturbation.changed_text: The extent and irrepa rable nature of the damages that may result from a breach of this Agreement may make Owner’s legal remedies for such a breach inadequate. Therefore, in the event of such breach or threatened breach of this Agreement, Owne r shall be entitled to appropriate injunctive relief only upon providing proof of actual damages, in addition, and not in substitution for, any other remedy Owner may have.
perturbation.explanation: By changing 'without proof of actual damages' to 'only upon providing proof of actual damages' we are contradicting our statement in the first sentence, The extent and irrepa rable nature of the damages that may result from a breach of this Agreement may make Owner’s legal remedies for such a breach inadequate. If the damages of irreperable we should not be asking for proof.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 4. The extent and irrepa rable nature of the damages that may result from a breach of this Agreement may make Owner’s legal remedies for such a breach inadequate. Therefore, in the event of such breach or threatened breach of this Agreement, Owne r shall be entitled to appropriate injunctive relief without proof of actual damages, in addition, and not in substitution for, any other remedy Owner may have.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the condition for obtaining injunctive relief from 'without proof of actual damages' to 'only upon providing proof of actual damages'. This directly contradicts the original intent, repeated in the contradicted text, that the irreparable nature of damages makes legal remedies inadequate, hence negating the need for proof of actual damages for injunctive relief. This introduces a strong, direct, and in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Investor is strictl y prohibited from publishing any news release, public announc ement, denial or confirmation with respect to the Development, this Agreement or any information about the Property.
perturbation.changed_text: Investor is strictl y prohibited from publishing any news release, public announc ement, denial or confirmation with respect to the Development, this Agreement or any information about the Property, unless explicitly authorized in writing by the Owner.
perturbation.explanation: By adding 'unless explicitly authorized in writing by the Owner' we are contradicting 'Investor is strictl y prohibited from publishing any news release, public announc ement, denial or confirmation with respect to the Development, this Agreement or any information about the Property.', by stating the investor is not allowed under any circumstance but introducing the scenario in which he is allowed, an in-text contradiction is being made.
perturbation.contradicted_text: NON-DISCLOSURE. Investor shall keep the Confidential Information permanently and strictly confidential, and not to discl ose or divulge any Confidential Information to, or reproduc e any Confidential Information for the benefit of any person or entity other than the Investor’s employees, representatives, consultants, and agents who are actively and directly participating in the analysis of the Development, and in such cases only to the extent reasonably required for such analysis. The Investor also agrees to inform all such employees, representatives, consultants, and agents of the confidential nature of the Confidential Information, to provide them with a copy of this Agreement, to obtain their agreement to act in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement, and to take such other action as may be reasonably necessary to cause such employees to comply with these confidentiality provisions. Investor is strictl y prohibited from publishing any news release, public announc ement, denial or confirmation with respect to the Development, this Agreement or any information about the Property. The Investor agrees to be fully respons ible for any breach of this Agreement caused by such employees, representatives, co nsultants, and agents.
perturbation.justification: The original text in the contradicted section states: 'Investor is strictl y prohibited from publishing any news release, public announc ement, denial or confirmation with respect to the Development, this Agreement or any information about the Property.' The changed text modifies this to allow publication if 'explicitly authorized in writing by the Owner.' This directly contradicts the original strict prohibition by introducing an exception, thus causing an in-text contradiction.
